creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Fri May 10 20:43:14 2013
New Revision: 317839
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/317839

Log:
  JMESPath (pronounced "jaymz path") allows you to declaratively specify how to
  extract elements from a JSON document.
  
  WWW: https://github.com/boto/jmespath
  
  PR:		178351
  Submitted by:	Alexey V. Degtyarev <alexey@renatasystems.org>

Added:
  head/devel/py-jmespath/
  head/devel/py-jmespath/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-jmespath/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-jmespath/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-jmespath/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/Makefile	Fri May 10 20:11:20 2013	(r317838)
+++ head/devel/Makefile	Fri May 10 20:43:14 2013	(r317839)
@@ -3525,6 +3525,7 @@
     SUBDIR += py-iterpipes
     SUBDIR += py-itools
     SUBDIR += py-jcc
+    SUBDIR += py-jmespath
     SUBDIR += py-jsmin
     SUBDIR += py-json-py
     SUBDIR += py-jsonlib

Added: head/devel/py-jmespath/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/py-jmespath/Makefile	Fri May 10 20:43:14 2013	(r317839)
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# Created by: Alexey V. Degtyarev <alexey@renatasystems.org>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	jmespath
+PORTVERSION=	0.0.2
+CATEGORIES=	devel python
+MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
+
+MAINTAINER=	alexey@renatasystems.org
+COMMENT=	JSON Matching Expressions
+
+LICENSE=	MIT
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}ply>=3.4:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-ply
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/devel/py-jmespath/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/py-jmespath/distinfo	Fri May 10 20:43:14 2013	(r317839)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (jmespath-0.0.2.tar.gz) = 3ce34292993eff87d66e160496c74520e0938c3fce01c55220b98cb5ab976b19
+SIZE (jmespath-0.0.2.tar.gz) = 7325

Added: head/devel/py-jmespath/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/py-jmespath/pkg-descr	Fri May 10 20:43:14 2013	(r317839)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+JMESPath (pronounced "jaymz path") allows you to declaratively specify how to
+extract elements from a JSON document.
+
+WWW: https://github.com/boto/jmespath

Added: head/devel/py-jmespath/pkg-plist
==============================================================================

+++ head/devel/py-jmespath/pkg-plist	Fri May 10 20:43:14 2013	(r317839)
@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
